query:
-- Unmatched DataGate items - what customers and products
SELECT bi.contactName, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.serviceExternalId, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.matchStatus IN ('unmatched', 'review')
ORDER BY bi.contactName, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;
